title: Study to Compare the Efficacy and Safety of NT 201 (Botulinum Toxin) With Placebo for the Treatment of Lower Limb Spasticity Caused by Stroke or Traumatic Brain Injury

skipped_criteria: Diagnosis of lower limb spasticity caused by stroke or traumatic brain injury: no schema field for spasticity diagnosis or stroke history.
Disabling ankle flexor spasticity presenting as pes equinus or pes equinovarus: no schema field for spasticity type or foot deformity.
Modified Ashworth Scale-Bohannon score of 2 or 3 in ankle plantar flexor: no schema field for MAS score.
Minimum passive range of motion in ankle (10° dorsiflexion and 20° plantarflexion): no schema field for range of motion.
At least 4 months since last botulinum neurotoxin injection: no schema field for prior BoNT injection history.
Anticoagulation therapy with aPTT ≤ 80 seconds or INR ≤ 2.5: no schema fields for aPTT or INR lab values (anticoagulant_use is present but cannot encode the lab thresholds).
Generalized disorders of muscle activity (myasthenia gravis, Lambert Eaton syndrome, ALS) or peripheral neuromuscular dysfunction: no schema field for neuromuscular diagnoses.
Bilateral lower limb paresis/paralysis/spasticity or tetraparesis/paralysis/spasticity: no schema field for laterality or paresis type.
Body weight < 50 kg: no schema field for body weight.
Severe atrophy of the target limb muscles: no schema field for muscle atrophy.
Previous, ongoing, or planned intrathecal baclofen treatment: no schema field for prior or planned treatments.
Previous, ongoing, or planned surgical intervention, alcohol/phenol block, or muscle afferent block in target limb: no schema field for prior procedures.
Physiotherapy or orthoses/splints initiated less than 4 weeks before screening or expected to change: no schema field for rehabilitation history.
Current or planned parenteral drugs interfering with neuromuscular transmission within 2 weeks prior to screening: no schema field for specific medication history.
Infection or inflammation at injection sites: no schema field for local infection status.
Presence or history of aspiration pneumonia, recurrent lower respiratory tract infections, or compromised respiratory function: no schema field for respiratory history.
Breast feeding exclusion: no schema field for lactation status.
